title: From Idea to Product: How I Build Real-World Applications
excerpt: Turning an idea into a working product requires more than coding. Here’s my process.
content:
Step 1: Understand the Problem

Every project starts with a clear problem to solve.

Step 2: Plan the System

I design the architecture before writing code.

Step 3: Build Iteratively

I focus on delivering value quickly, then improving.

Step 4: Optimize

Performance and UX are key to success.
